code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn get_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match xs.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn byte_or_zero(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn add_token(_ acc: List<Int>, _ s: String, _ start: Int, _ stop: Int) -> List<Int>
  let tok = string.substring(s, start, stop)
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    if list.contains(acc, v)
      acc
    else
      list.push(acc, v)
    end
  when None
    acc
  end
end

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ v: Int) -> List<Int>
  let n = sorted.len()
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut j = 0
  mut inserted = false
  while j < n
    let sv = get_at(sorted, j)
    if not inserted and v < sv
      result = list.push(result, v)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, sv)
    j = j + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, v)
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut tokens: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  mut start = -1
  while i < n
    let b = byte_or_zero(input, i)
    if is_ws(b)
      if start >= 0
        tokens = add_token(tokens, input, start, i)
        start = -1
      end
    else
      if start < 0
        start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if start >= 0
    tokens = add_token(tokens, input, start, n)
  end

  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut k = 0
  let tcount = tokens.len()
  while k < tcount
    let v = get_at(tokens, k)
    sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, v)
    k = k + 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut m = 0
  let olen = sorted.len()
  while m < olen
    let v = get_at(sorted, m)
    if m == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    m = m + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
